title: SirJBiscuit/automatic-system

summary: Standalone terminal agent with multi-provider LLM support (DeepSeek, OpenAI, Anthropic, Grok, Ollama), MCP integration, image attachments, and adaptive context compression

summary: Telegram-driven multi-agent AI office kernel (Sanitized version)

title: mezmo/aura
summary: A production-ready framework for composing AI agents from declarative TOML configuration, with MCP tool integration, RAG pipelines, and an OpenAI-compatible web API.

title: gfargo/localpress
summary: Local-compute WordPress media optimization CLI. Compress, convert, remove backgrounds, generate alt-text — all on your hardware. No cloud, no credits, no plugin required.

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: personal AI runtime, local-first. MCP bridge giving Claude Code 170+ tools (LSP, debugger, terminal, git) inside VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or JetBrains. Optional Patchwork layer adds YAML recipes, an approval queue, and an oversight dashboard. Your models, your machine, your policy.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: open-webui/open-webui
summary: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)

title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: celltoolz/notepad-ide
summary: A full Python IDE & GUI Designer with professional-grade tools

title: Keel-Labs/keel
summary: An AI assistant whose memory belongs to you. Local-first Mac app, plain markdown workspace, bring your own model.

title: cocopadrainplug882/local-study-os
summary: Manage university courses, deadlines, and study workloads with an offline-first academic planner that stores all data locally in your browser.

title: kadubon/oasg
summary: Local-first, model-agnostic workflow optimizer for long-running AI agents: observable JSONL ledgers, deterministic reducers, no-meta gates, and receipt-backed self-improvement without LLM judges or model-weight updates.

title: romanr3314/designpull
summary: Extract design systems from any website using AI vision to generate Google Stitch compatible DESIGN.md files.

title: Annamariecandid937/gemma-chat-windows
